title: cymbalaria minor
intro: Cymbalaria minor, also known as henbit, is a small annual or perennial flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cymbalaria minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, coughs, and skin irritations. Cymbalaria minor can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
